title: Twilight
content:
'Twixt a smile and a tear,
    'Twixt a song and a sigh,
    'Twixt the day and the dark,
    When the night draweth nigh.

    Ah, sunshine may fade
    From the heavens above,
    No twilight have we
    To the day of our love.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Paul Laurence Dunbar, titled "Twilight", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
